ValidationRule.description: Can not approve Transport Job if the current status is not Completed.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED( Status__c ), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Approved'), OR( NOT(ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status__c) , 'Completed')), Open_Driver_Assignment__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Transport Job can only be approved once the status is marked as "Completed".
